diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was based on the evaluation of hexosaminidase isozymes in fibroblast cell lines from the patients, which showed the inability to convert the 67 KD precursor to the mature 54 KD peptide. Additionally, the patients had significantly reduced Hex A-associated 4MUGS cleaving activity compared to normal controls, which correlated with the onset of the illness. The clinical presentation included progressive deterioration of gait and mental functioning, ataxia, and spasticity, further supporting the diagnosis.
